# Kandati Ranjith Kumar Reddy — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Kandati Ranjith Kumar Reddy, a full stack / MERN developer building fast, accessible, beautifully animated web experiences with React, Node.js, and modern UI engineering.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction, featured highlights, and quick links.
- [About](/about): Background, education at SVCE, and career objective.
- [Skills](/skills): Languages, frameworks, databases, and tools.
- [Projects](/projects): Doctor Appointment Booking System, Real-Time Chat Application, TripNest, and more.
- [Experience](/experience): Internships, certifications, and achievements.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, phone, and social channels.
